papers_found.title: Cohen-Lenstra heuristics and local conditions
papers_found.notes: Proves function field analogs of C-L for real quadratic fields

papers_found.title: Heuristics and related results on class groups of real quadratic fields
papers_found.notes: Discusses modifications to C-L heuristics for real quadratic fields. Directly relevant.

papers_found.title: Indivisibility of class numbers of real quadratic fields
papers_found.notes: Theoretical lower bounds on class numbers

assessment: Cohen-Lenstra heuristics are extensively studied. The non-monotone convergence (h=1 rate dropping from 42% to 15% before predicted asymptotic rise) is a novel computational observation not reported in existing literature. Finding is consistent with but extends known theory.
